creator: kepa@sureva.es
text:
Spanish people always we have to setup the keyboard after the instalation.
I think it would be great if we wouldnt have to do it.

Un saludo.
Raul.

How-To-Repeat: Installing FreeBSD in a host with Spanish Keyboard and setting up the spanish one during the instalation with its own font. After that, trying to input spanish characters in the console.
